name: Peasant Knight
short_description: Peasant Knight is a challenging puzzle-platformer that you can play with only two keys: jump and stop. All the while you're relentlessly dashing forward into traps, enemies, and hazards.
detailed_description:
Wishlist Devious Dungeon 2


About the Game

Peasant Knight is a challenging puzzle-platformer that you can play with only two keys: jump and stop.
All the while you're relentlessly dashing forward into traps, enemies, and hazards.
Peasant Knight has a tongue-in-cheek tone that fits well the many ways to reach your demise.

Features:
* 80+ levels to solve
* 18 traps, enemies, and bosses to overcome.
* Local multiplayer (up to 4 players)
* Coop and race modes

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian
